# Code Anchors: Close-Entry Migration

- `libs/close-migration/src/migrate.ts` — the gated migrate → verify → remove sequence: copy the entry into the hub, path-scoped hub commit, byte-for-byte read-back, and code-repo removal only on that confirmation (idempotent re-run, partial-copy cleanup).
- `libs/close-migration/src/preflight.ts` — the role gate: role from the committed workspace artifacts, hub location and branch from the shared resolver, member-mode reachability proven up front; read-only.
- `libs/close-migration/src/identity.ts` — derives the code-repo identity for the range block as a normalized host/owner/repo, labeled by source (origin / first-remote / directory-name).
- `libs/close-migration/src/diagnostic.ts` — the structured failure shapes (wrong-role, entry-conflict, hub-detached-head, hub-commit-failed, verify-mismatch, removal-failed) plus pass-through resolver diagnostics.
- `libs/close-migration/src/render.ts` — the preflight read-out, migration outcome, and failure diagnostic as plain terminal text.
- `libs/close-migration/src/run.ts` — the single git process seam every step runs through, so specs can inject failures.
- `.claude/skills/nxs-close-migration/scripts/close_migration.ts` — the CLI entry: `preflight` (role read-out) and `migrate` (gated cross-repo move); exit 0/1/2.
- `.claude/skills/nxs-close-migration/SKILL.md` — the skill doc: the observable surface and the safety contract.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.close.md` — the close command's cross-repo tail: Phase 1.3 role gate, Phase 4 range stamp, Phase 7 checkpoint items, Phase 7.5 migrate step, member-mode report + push instruction.
- `.nexus/config/templates/close-record-template.md` — the `range:` block and its filling guidance.
- `common/templates/close-record-template.md` — the seed copy of the same range block.
- `libs/close-migration/src/migrate.spec.ts` — the ordering, verify-before-remove, idempotency, and failure-mode behavior.
- `libs/close-migration/src/preflight.spec.ts` — role resolution and member-mode reachability across the three checkout shapes.
- `libs/close-migration/src/identity.spec.ts` — identity derivation and the labeled fallbacks.
- `libs/close-migration/src/render.spec.ts` — read-out rendering for each mode and outcome.
- `libs/close-migration/src/git-fixtures.ts` — test-support: real temp git repos for the specs.
